name: L6 — World Eater Mono-Void
flavor: One element, but he counts in tongues no one hears.
description: Mono-VOID team built around world_eater — the L6 paradox showcase. Without the L6 mutation, a mono-element team has team.distinct_elements=1, so every FLUX gate (≥ 2 distinct, ≥ 3 distinct, ≥ 4 distinct) would fire on nothing. With L6 active (charter §22.2 L6), FLUX cards on world_eater's team see effective distinct_elements = 1 + 2 = 3, which UNLOCKS the ≥2 gate (BUFF_ATK on void_chimera/void_chimerlet, DEBUFF_ATK on shade_prismatic/shadeprism) and the ≥3 gate (world_eater's own ON_ATTACK DAMAGE). The ≥4 gate stays gated — L6 doesn't make a mono team rainbow, just enough rainbow for the lower gates. dread_warden is a non-FLUX REVENANT VOID anchor that doesn't depend on the mutation but rounds out the team's debuff pressure.
